zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: Joan於大約1317年出生。她於大約1336年與Sir Henry Scrope在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年5月6日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan于大约1317年出生。她于大约1336年与Sir Henry Scrope在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年5月6日在英国英格兰越可爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joan was born about 1317. She married Sir Henry Scrope about 1336, in Masham, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 May 1386, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan est née environ 1317. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Scrope environ 1336, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1386, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan wurde um 1317 geboren. Sie hat um 1336 in Masham, Yorkshire, England Sir Henry Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1386 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Joan è nata il circa 1317. Lei sposato Sir Henry Scrope circa 1336, nel Masham, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1386, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Masham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアマシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Joanは約1317年に生まれた。約1336年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムでSir Henry Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年5月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan(은)는 대략 1317년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1336년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 Sir Henry Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan nasceu aproximadamente 1317. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Scrope aproximadamente 1336, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1386, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan родилась около 1317 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Scrope около 1336 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 мая 1386 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan nació aproximadamente 1317. Se casó con Sir Henry Scrope aproximadamente 1336, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1386, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
